creator: stefan@fh-mainz.de
text:
Sorry about the noise.
To update the port sysutils/mcron from version 1.0.2 to 1.0.3 or 1.0.4
I need guile >= 1.8, it will not work with guile 1.6.x [1].
I've also seen that games/trackballs needs guile >= 1.8 for updating.

[1] http://www.gnu.org/software/mcron/#releases
